tokens.name: background
tokens.role: Neutral page background for the full control center.

tokens.name: surface
tokens.role: Primary panel surface.

tokens.name: surface-muted
tokens.role: Subtle field or secondary surface.

tokens.name: border
tokens.role: Default component border.

tokens.name: border-strong
tokens.role: Stronger evidence or control border.

tokens.name: text
tokens.role: Primary readable UI text.

tokens.name: muted
tokens.role: Secondary metadata text.

tokens.name: default-radius
tokens.role: Default radius for cards, panels, buttons, and modals.

tokens.name: surface-shadow
tokens.role: Low elevation for operational surfaces.

tokens.name: raised-shadow
tokens.role: Raised elevation for headers, popups, and temporary progress surfaces.

tokens.name: focus-ring
tokens.role: Visible focus ring for keyboard operation.

tokens.name: page-accent
tokens.role: Fallback page accent color for filled page icons.

tokens.name: page-soft
tokens.role: Fallback soft page accent, reserved for subtle emphasis.

tokens.name: page-border
tokens.role: Fallback page header border.

tokens.name: workflow-accent
tokens.role: Readable teal accent for Development Workflow icons, labels, and action affordances.

tokens.name: workflow-soft
tokens.role: Soft teal surface for Development Workflow icons and subtle workflow emphasis.

tokens.name: safety-accent
tokens.role: Readable green accent for safety actions, labels, and filled safety icons. It must meet normal-text contrast against white surfaces.

tokens.name: safety-soft
tokens.role: Soft green safety surface for hover states, read-only banners, and subtle safety emphasis.

tokens.name: safety-border
tokens.role: Soft green border for safety buttons and safety state chips.

tokens.name: menu-tile-icon-background
tokens.role: Default soft background for unselected context menu tile icons.

tokens.name: menu-tile-icon-color
tokens.role: Default readable icon color for unselected context menu tile icons.

tokens.name: menu-tile-selected-icon-background
tokens.role: Default filled background for selected context menu tile icons.

tokens.name: menu-tile-selected-icon-color
tokens.role: Default icon color on selected context menu tile icons.

tokens.name: font-size-body
tokens.role: Default Dashboard body text size.

tokens.name: font-size-section-title
tokens.role: Default compact section and card title size.

tokens.name: font-size-page-title
tokens.role: Default page title size.

tokens.name: workflow-body-font-weight
tokens.role: Readable but light body text weight for Development Workflow summaries.

tokens.name: workflow-primary-font-weight
tokens.role: Moderate primary value weight for Development Workflow summaries; lighter than headings and chips.

tokens.name: section-gap
tokens.role: Default gap between dashboard sections and design-studio preview blocks.

tokens.name: panel-padding
tokens.role: Default padding for Dashboard panels and Design Studio editor surfaces.

tokens.name: card-padding
tokens.role: Default padding for repeated operational cards and compact content surfaces.

tokens.name: card-gap
tokens.role: Default internal gap for repeated operational cards and compact content surfaces.

tokens.name: row-padding
tokens.role: Default padding for repeated table, settings, evidence, and activity rows.

tokens.name: row-gap
tokens.role: Default internal gap for repeated table, settings, evidence, and activity rows.

tokens.name: page-header-padding
tokens.role: Default padding for page titles and detail page headers.

tokens.name: control-gap
tokens.role: Default compact gap between controls inside reusable components.

tokens.name: action-control-height
tokens.role: Default minimum height for primary and secondary action buttons.

tokens.name: action-control-padding
tokens.role: Default padding for action buttons that perform review, apply, reset, or close actions.

tokens.name: compact-control-height
tokens.role: Default minimum height for compact page-header, card, and detail buttons.

tokens.name: compact-control-padding
tokens.role: Default padding for compact page-header, card, and detail buttons.

tokens.name: form-control-height
tokens.role: Default minimum height for select and form controls.

tokens.name: form-control-padding
tokens.role: Default padding for select and form controls.

tokens.name: icon-button-size
tokens.role: Default square size for icon-only controls such as modal close buttons.

tokens.name: control-font-size
tokens.role: Default text size for action and form controls.

tokens.name: metadata-gap
tokens.role: Default gap between page header metadata chips.

tokens.name: page-icon-size
tokens.role: Default filled icon size for page titles and detail page headers.

tokens.name: badge-gap
tokens.role: Stable gap between text and icons inside status, risk, and workflow-mode badges.

tokens.name: badge-padding
tokens.role: Default compact padding for status and risk badges.

tokens.name: mode-badge-padding
tokens.role: Default padding for Git and workflow mode badges.

tokens.name: common-mode-badge-padding
tokens.role: Compact padding for common-status workflow badges.

tokens.name: badge-height
tokens.role: Default minimum height for status, risk, and workflow-mode badges.

tokens.name: common-mode-badge-height
tokens.role: Default compact minimum height for common-status workflow badges.

tokens.name: badge-font-size
tokens.role: Default text size for status and risk badges.

tokens.name: mode-badge-font-size
tokens.role: Default text size for Git and workflow mode badges.

tokens.name: common-mode-badge-font-size
tokens.role: Default compact text size for common-status workflow badges.

tokens.name: technical-affordance-gap
tokens.role: Stable gap between a visible technical value and its copy affordance.

tokens.name: technical-source-max-width
tokens.role: Default maximum width for visible source-path chips before the copy control.

tokens.name: technical-evidence-max-width
tokens.role: Default maximum width for evidence reference chips before the copy control.

tokens.name: technical-preview-chip-max-width
tokens.role: Default maximum width for Design Studio preview chips.
